## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX Labs' strategy sprint process and potential improvements to their content creation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's Atlas system impresses clients with comprehensive research and artifact generation](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Current workflow involves manual curation and client feedback, with potential for automation](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Calibration and customization per client (e.g., tone, industry focus) are crucial for quality output](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Opportunity to streamline assignment generation and prioritization process](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)

## Topics

### Atlas System Demonstration

  - [Clients (e.g., Rapid) impressed by comprehensive research and artifact generation](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [System creates detailed strategy sprint documents in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Artifacts include company research, audience profiles, and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Potential to move from Notion to integrated system experience for clients](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Calibration Process

  - [Manual process to determine client's preferred tone and style](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Uses AI to generate author profiles, quotes, and style examples](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Creates mood boards of words and sentences for client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Aims for 80% direct communication style with customized examples](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### Research and Assignment Generation

  - [Ingests client's internal URLs and uses SEMrush for keyword data](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Filters out brand mentions and irrelevant sections](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Editors manually review and approve content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Assignments categorized by status (e.g., backlog, approved, in production)](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Metadata includes topic clusters, group types, personas, and industries](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

### Workflow Optimization Opportunities

  - [Potential for better integration between research and assignment generation](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Opportunity to automate editor's manual review process](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [AI could prioritize top 10 recommendations for quicker human approval](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Current human curation is cost-effective but could be enhanced with AI scoring](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore ways to automate the editor's manual review process for content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Investigate integration of AI-driven scoring and prioritization for assignments](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Consider developing a more seamless experience for clients to interact with generated artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Evaluate the potential for moving from Notion to an integrated system for strategy sprint documentation](https://fathom.video/share/MxfxjMXxu3RV7SgzXy_o2XJZyEeV1TXH?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
